name: Helluva Boss RPG [ALT Scenario]
description:
Ooo A Christmas theme Helluva Boss RPG? Yes please!

[IMPORTNAT NOTES]: I literally just want to do this so I have said I did something for Christmas on here. It'll be base off of Sinsmas holiday for Hell and yes the recent episode of Helluva Boss which was the Season 2 Finale. I liked it, but Octavia needs to stop being so angst. Do note that this bot does have the majority of Helluva Boss characters. I did not add Val into this one. JLLM may not work due to the tokens... but it might too. I do have another ALT RPG of Helluva Boss, but I need to make a YouTube Video to help you guys play with that bot better. So... It's in the works and probably won't be done for another few days. On that note, enjoy guys.

[PLOT]: It's Sinsmas in Hell and all demon natives are celebrating their birth Sin (like imps celebrate Wrath since Satan created them, or Succubus celebrate Lust since Asmodeus created them, technically or accurately... I don't know this part confuses me in the Hellaverse), or their Sin of choice. So, what kind of Sin are celebrating? Who are you celebrating with? (Yes this one is a little more free range. Don't expect a long introduction message)

[ADDITIONAL NOTES]: This is pretty much the same stuff; DO NOT dislike if the bot doesn't work for JLLM, DO NOT dislike without a valid reason, DO NOT like dislike because of the concept of the bot, DO NOT dislike if the bot gets descriptions wrong, and DO NOT dislike if the bot speaks for you. I'm not sure JLLM will work, again many characters. If JLLM does work, it will have memory leak issues. you can edit messages and refresh them to fix this. This is a JLLM problem not mine! Also, respond in big paragraphs to prevent it from respond for ya. Again, that's a JLLM issue and sometimes a Openia issue.

[PICTURE]: The picture is the official Helluva Boss Pride Month photo. Not sure if I'll make a personalized picture for this bot. I still got, 20 others to do so...

[DISCORD]: Hey! Did you know I have a Discord? You should join so I can get live feedback and respond to you quicker! Note: the discord is still in development. Link: https://discord.gg/448se6GE95

[SHAMELESS PROMOTION]: Hey guys! I'm doing a competition known as The Face of Halloween, and I need your help! Click the link and go vote for me every 24 hours so I can Win! The First round ends September 4th @ 7pm PDT! I need you guys to help me win so I can give $1000 of my winning money to the Starlight Children's Foundation! Here's the link to vote for me: https://faceofhalloween.org/2025/jackie-mcdrummond and here's the link with information on what the Face of Halloween is all about: https://faceofhalloween.org/ Side Note: IF you donate on my page, each dollar donated will go to the charity and I'll get a vote from each dollar. Example: donate $10 = I get 10 votes.

[Character Information]: I'm only adding main characters and constant support characters. I am not adding dead characters like Chaz. The characters that are going to be in this are Blitzo, Stolas, Loona, Millie, Moxxie, Asmodeus, Beelzebub, Satan, Mammon, Levithan, Belphegor, Striker, Stella, Andrealphus, Vassago, Octavia, Paimon, Fizzarolli, Crimson, Verosika, and Vortex. Ones that are not listed are not being add
creator: JayTheDT
